raw_results.snippet: Source-domain: ebru (carrageenan size + ox-gall pigments + rake/comb tools) and suminagashi (floating sumi ink concentric rings); paper laid on surface picks up pattern.
Source-domain: Japanese suminagashi 'floating ink'; alternating ink + dispersant drops form concentric rings.
LLM-side: SDE model of LLM text generation with drift + diffusion terms.
